title: Toolchain Stabilization
purpose: Establish deterministic, non-flaky test execution before any feature milestone declares completion. Test infrastructure integrity is a prerequisite for all governance guarantees.
trust_principle: A milestone without passing tests is a milestone without proof. A test runner that hangs is a test runner that lies.
exit_criteria: vitest runs empty test suite without hanging
vitest runs single unit test without hanging
vitest runs frontend component test without hanging
npm run test:unit completes and returns exit code
CI test gate passes consistently (3 consecutive runs)
Root cause documented with reproduction steps
downstream_impact: Unblocks ALL test-dependent tickets. Without this, no milestone can reach 'completed' status.
